reference_policy: reference[0] is not used as gold; it remains a difficulty signal only.

kanban_card: G22 - Gan Closed-Option Target Selection Ledger
g22_claim_scope: closed-option target selection over raw deterministic temporal candidates plus prediction-time constructed aggregation options
fixed_controls: gan_2026_fixed_v1:validation split and G6 standard50 record IDs

no scorer, loader, split, bridge, candidate-builder, constructor, label-construction, or prediction-repair behavior changes
G19/G17/G21 artifacts are reporting overlays only and are not visible to the model
